questions.question: Which update process best protects IoT devices?
questions.description: Signed OTA updates help confirm firmware authenticity and integrity.

questions.question: Which hardware feature can protect device secrets?
questions.description: TPMs or secure elements can protect keys and support measured boot.

questions.question: Which issue is created by leaving JTAG exposed on production devices?
questions.description: Exposed debug interfaces can allow firmware extraction or device manipulation.
